name: CRISPR-Cas9 Gene Editing
description: Programmable genome editing using CRISPR-Cas9 system

name: mRNA Vaccine Platform
description: Modified mRNA encoding antigens for vaccination (Moderna/BioNTech)

name: Monoclonal Antibody Therapy (Adalimumab/Humira)
description: Fully human monoclonal antibodies targeting TNF-alpha for autoimmune disease

name: CAR-T Cell Therapy
description: Chimeric antigen receptor T-cells for cancer immunotherapy

name: Polymerase Chain Reaction (PCR)
description: Enzymatic amplification of specific DNA sequences

name: Recombinant Human Insulin
description: Genetically engineered human insulin produced in bacteria

name: PD-1 Immune Checkpoint Inhibitor (Nivolumab)
description: Anti-PD-1 antibody enabling cancer immunotherapy by blocking immune checkpoint (Honjo/Ono Pharmaceutical)

name: AAV Gene Therapy Vectors
description: Adeno-associated virus capsid vectors for gene therapy (Samulski/Wilson)

name: Drug-Eluting Coronary Stent
description: Sirolimus-coated intravascular stent for preventing restenosis (J&J/Cordis CYPHER)

name: RNA Interference (RNAi/siRNA)
description: Gene silencing via double-stranded RNA interference (Fire/Mello/Tuschl)

name: HIV Protease Inhibitors
description: Protease inhibitors for HIV/AIDS treatment transforming survival (saquinavir/ritonavir/indinavir)

name: DNA Microarray (Gene Chip)
description: High-density oligonucleotide arrays for parallel gene expression analysis (Affymetrix)

name: Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT)
description: Non-invasive cross-sectional imaging using low-coherence interferometry (Fujimoto/MIT)

name: Antisense Oligonucleotide Therapeutics
description: Synthetic oligonucleotides that silence disease genes by binding complementary mRNA (ISIS Pharmaceuticals; first drug fomivirsen approved 1998)

name: Statin Drugs (Lovastatin)
description: HMG-CoA reductase inhibitors lowering LDL cholesterol to prevent cardiovascular disease (Merck/Alberts; first statin drug class)
